title: TAB Research Cache
description: Keyed by sha256(normalized_query + tool + date_window). Scope is per-session by default; global shared cache lives under ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/shared-cache/cache.json with the same schema. Finalized in Block 2.

scope.description: session = per-session cache under .tab/sessions/<id>/. shared = cross-session under ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/shared-cache/. Optional; defaults to session when absent.

category.description: TTL bucket. volatile (JS/AI, LLM ecosystems): 7-day freshness. mature (DBs, languages, compilers): 30-day freshness. Absent → treated as volatile.

expires_at.description: Computed from fetched_at + category TTL. Consumers MUST honor this when reading; writers populate it on insert.

invalidated_at.description: Set by `cache invalidate <topic>` when a user manually evicts the entry. Reads with invalidated_at != null are misses.
